positive: A stylized, central composition featuring a majestic Bengal tiger playfully interacting with a glowing ethereal orchid. The tiger should have clean, bold black and orange stripes, rendered in a modern, flat vector illustration style with dynamic silhouettes. The orchid glows with iridescent cyan and deep magenta accents, casting subtle, stylized light. The background should be a minimalist blend of deep jungle emerald and midnight indigo, creating high contrast and emphasizing the subjects. Use strong outlines, graphic novel aesthetic, and clean lines, suitable for screen printing on fabric. Highly detailed, high saturation, centered, full body shot.
negative: blurry, deformed, artifacts, watermark, signature, low resolution, text, extra limbs, bad anatomy, noise, cartoonish, photography, realistic photo
